sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: EDGAR Filing Documents for 0000783325-26-000035
feed.summary: This SEC filing details a Form DEF 14A, an Other Definitive Proxy Statement, submitted by WEC ENERGY GROUP, INC. (CIK: 0000783325). The filing includes various documents, graphic files, and XBRL data files, with a filing date of March 26, 2026, and a report period ending December 31, 2025.

feed.title: The Future of Medical Innovation with AI: Yonsei University Health System Uses AI Agents to Enhance Efficiency and Professionalism in Administrative & Support Processes
feed.summary: Yonsei University Health System is implementing AI agents, particularly Microsoft Copilot, to improve administrative and support processes and enhance efficiency and professionalism. The Digital Health Strategy Center is building a citizen developer ecosystem where departments can refine their own AI agents, reducing repetitive work and providing faster access to critical information for staff, especially nurses. This strategic approach aims to integrate AI across the hospital, starting with administrative functions and gradually expanding to clinical care while ensuring data security.

feed.title: Wabtec Rose 16% Year to Date. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Wabtec (WAB) stock has risen 16% year-to-date, trading at $248 per share, driven by strong institutional demand and improved visibility into its long-term growth, particularly from its recurring service revenue. The company recently announced new contracts in India for pantograph supply, further reinforcing its backlog and international growth prospects. A valuation model suggests Wabtec is modestly undervalued with a target price of $290, implying a 17% upside, supported by projected revenue growth, expanding operating margins, and a focus on aftermarket services.

feed.title: GE HealthCare announces lead industrial role in largest EU-funded IHI consortium to advance cardio-oncology care across Europe
feed.summary: GE HealthCare is taking a leading role in the COMPASS consortium, a five-year, €50.5 million EU-funded initiative aimed at advancing cardio-oncology care across Europe. This public-private partnership seeks to improve early detection and prediction of cardiotoxicity in cancer patients and survivors by leveraging AI, advanced imaging, biomarkers, and integrated care pathways. The goal is to address the rising cardiovascular complications in cancer patients, which have become the second leading cause of death for survivors, by promoting patient-centered clinical pathways, multidisciplinary collaboration, and innovative predictive tools.

feed.title: The executive who helped launch Watson will keynote FICO World 2026
feed.summary: FICO (NYSE: FICO) announced that Sol Rashidi, the world's first Chief AI Officer for Enterprise and a key figure in IBM Watson's launch, will deliver a keynote at FICO World 2026. The conference, taking place May 19-22 in Orlando, Florida, will focus on AI-powered enterprise transformation, risk management, and customer growth strategies. Rashidi's extensive experience in AI deployments will offer valuable insights into leveraging AI for financial services.

feed.title: KKR expanding in Japan despite commodity spike vulnerability, CIO says
feed.summary: KKR is expanding its private equity, credit, insurance, and real estate businesses in Japan, citing the country's corporate governance reforms and sustained inflation as key drivers. This expansion comes despite Japan's vulnerability to energy price shocks, which its chief investment officer anticipates will lead to higher commodity prices due to geopolitical conflicts. KKR sees opportunities in real estate, encouraged by companies offloading non-core assets, and in the growing private credit market.

feed.title: RENX ENTERPRISES CONFIRMS MICROTEC UTM 1200 TURBO MILL
feed.summary: RenX Enterprises Corp. has received written confirmation that its Microtec UTM 1200 Turbo Mill is completed and ready for shipment from Germany, with delivery expected in April 2026 to its Myakka City, Florida facility. This mill is a key component for processing woody biomass into high-value wood fiber substrates. The company has finalized extensive pre-installation work and plans for the initial milling line to be operational in 2026, with further automation phases planned for 2027.

feed.title: Cintas Earns Newsweek’s America’s Greatest Workplaces for Entry Level 2026 Award
feed.summary: Cintas Corporation has been recognized on Newsweek's America's Greatest Workplaces for Entry Level 2026 list, highlighting its commitment to developing new employees. The company's President and CEO, Todd Schneider, emphasized the importance of opportunity, training, and support for entry-level employee-partners. This recognition is based on a nationwide survey of over 610,000 company reviews from young employees and extensive interviews, underscoring Cintas's successful programs like the Management Trainee Program.

feed.title: A German mill is headed to Florida for RenX's biomass buildout
feed.summary: RenX Enterprises confirmed that its Microtec UTM 1200 Turbo Mill is complete and ready for shipment from Germany, with expected delivery to its Myakka City, Florida facility in April 2026. This mill is a key component of a 12-step processing circuit designed to handle up to 10 tons per hour of woody biomass. The initial milling phase is projected to be operational in 2026, while downstream bagging and soil blending operations are planned for no earlier than 2027.

feed.title: Quoin Pharmaceuticals Provides Corporate Update and Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Quoin Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: QNRX) announced its Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results and provided a corporate update, highlighting significant progress in its clinical development and regulatory strategies for rare and orphan diseases. The company secured up to $104.5 million in private placement financing, gained Orphan Drug Designations for QRX003 in both the U.S. and Europe, and advanced expedited regulatory pathways in Japan and Saudi Arabia. Quoin also reported continued positive clinical data for QRX003 in Netherton Syndrome, expanded its pediatric and Peeling Skin Syndrome studies, and has plans for further clinical trials and an IND submission for QRX003 later this year, while its topical rapamycin platforms are set for clinical studies in the second half of 2026.

feed.title: Quoin lands $104.5M as rare skin drug child study expands
feed.summary: Quoin Pharmaceuticals announced a private placement of up to $104.5 million, securing orphan and Fast Track designations for its lead drug QRX003, which is aimed at treating Netherton Syndrome. The company also expanded its pediatric study for Netherton Syndrome to seven patients and anticipates initiating Phase 3 and releasing topline data in the second half of 2026. Despite widening net losses in 2025, Quoin's year-end cash balance of $18.7 million is expected to fund operations into 2027.

feed.title: Wells Fargo has more growth ahead after lifting of asset restrictions, Jefferies says
feed.summary: Jefferies has initiated coverage of Wells Fargo with a "buy" rating and a $100 price target, expecting the bank to see significant growth. This comes as the U.S. Federal Reserve lifted a seven-year restriction on Wells Fargo's assets in June 2025, enabling the bank to pursue unhindered growth after addressing prior governance and control issues. Jefferies believes this will allow Wells Fargo to compete equally with peers, leading to balance sheet growth and improved financial metrics.

feed.title: UNIQURE N.V. (QURE) SHAREHOLDER ALERT Bernstein Liebhard
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP is reminding investors of uniQure N.V. (NASDAQ: QURE) about an upcoming deadline for a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that uniQure and its senior officers made misrepresentations regarding AMT-130, a drug for Huntington's Disease, to investors who purchased shares between September 24, 2025, and October 31, 2025. Shareholders wishing to serve as lead plaintiff must file papers by April 13, 2026.

feed.title: PAYPAL HOLDINGS, INC. (PYPL) SHAREHOLDER ALERT Bernstein
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has issued a shareholder alert for PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) investors regarding an upcoming deadline in a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal and its senior officers made misrepresentations concerning financial targets and growth projections for its core branded checkout segment. Investors who purchased PayPal common stock between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026, and lost money, are encouraged to contact the firm by April 20, 2026, to discuss their legal rights and options or potentially serve as a lead plaintiff.

feed.title: ENPHASE ENERGY, INC. (ENPH) SHAREHOLDER ALERT Bernstein
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has issued a shareholder alert for Enphase Energy Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH), reminding investors of an upcoming deadline for a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Enphase made misrepresentations regarding its ability to manage channel inventory and mitigate the impact of a credit termination for its products. Investors who purchased Enphase securities between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm by April 20, 2026, to discuss their options.

feed.title: ORACLE CORPORATION (ORCL) SHAREHOLDER ALERT Bernstein
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP is reminding Oracle Corporation (ORCL) investors of a class action lawsuit filed against the company for alleged securities fraud. The lawsuit claims Oracle made misrepresentations regarding contracts for AI infrastructure data center development and the impact of capital expenditures on revenue growth. Investors who purchased ORCL shares between June 12, 2025, and December 16, 2025, have until April 6, 2026, to file as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Stifel reiterates Buy on Generac stock citing strong growth outlook
feed.summary: Stifel maintained its Buy rating and $235 price target on Generac Holdings (NYSE:GNRC) following the company's recent investor day. Generac provided guidance for high single-digit residential revenue growth and low to mid 20% growth for its commercial and industrial segment, with total 2028 EBITDA projected between $1.25 billion and $1.45 billion. The company's growth is supported by macro trends like rising electricity demand, grid fragility, AI demand, and global infrastructure investment, despite a recent decline in shares due to the lack of a hyperscaler agreement announcement.

feed.title: Enphase launches energy management system in Australia, New Zealand
feed.summary: Enphase Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:ENPH) has launched its IQ Energy Management system in Australia and New Zealand, designed to optimize energy consumption by integrating with existing solar and IQ Battery systems to control major home appliances. This new system targets markets with high rooftop solar adoption and aims to help homeowners manage variable electricity rates and maximize the use of clean energy. The company's stock shows attractive valuation metrics and positive analyst sentiment despite near-term revenue challenges.

feed.title: Pulmatrix to acquire Eos SENOLYTIX in $19M anti-aging deal
feed.summary: Pulmatrix, Inc. has announced a definitive merger agreement to acquire Eos SENOLYTIX, Inc. in a $19 million deal. The combined entity will operate as Eos SENOLYTIX, Inc., trading on Nasdaq under "EOSX," and will focus on developing peptide therapies for aging-related diseases, particularly sarcopenia, through Eos’s MitoXcel platform. The transaction, which includes concurrent private financings, is subject to stockholder approval and regulatory requirements and is expected to close in mid-2026.

feed.title: This 10/10 Costco Dessert Is Back; It’s a “Run to Costco Kind of Find”
feed.summary: Costco has brought back its popular Tiramisu Cold Brew Cheesecake, a dessert that captivated fans last year. This 4.5-pound cheesecake features a cocoa graham cracker crust, coffee-infused cheesecake mixture, whipped topping, and cocoa powder, selling for around $22.99. Enthusiastic customers have expressed excitement over its return, solidifying its status as a highly sought-after item.

feed.title: Intuitive Machines and Rocket Lab Stocks Rise as NASA Plans $20 Billion Moon Base
feed.summary: Intuitive Machines (LUNR) and Rocket Lab (RKLB) stocks rose significantly after NASA announced plans for a $20 billion permanent moon base, shifting focus from its Gateway project. This initiative creates a multi-billion dollar market for private space companies for infrastructure development and cargo delivery. The upcoming Artemis II mission, scheduled for April 1, is also fueling investor optimism within the space sector.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line Elliott Pressure: $26 Target Price Amid Turnaround Execution
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) faces pressure from activist investor Elliott Investment Management amidst a projected full-year EPS below analyst consensus and a current stock price significantly under its 52-week high. Despite recent revenue misses due to misaligned Caribbean capacity, the company anticipates a strong turnaround through 2027, supported by new attractions, fuel hedges, and a significant order book for new ships. Wall Street analysts maintain a cautious view with a mean price target reflecting potential but contingent on improved execution.

feed.title: Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ:CTAS) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ:CTAS) reported strong Q3 2026 results, with record revenues of $2.84 billion, an 8.9% increase, and diluted EPS of $1.24, up 9.7%. The company raised its fiscal 2026 financial guidance, anticipating revenue between $11.21 billion and $11.24 billion and adjusted diluted EPS in the range of $4.86 to $4.90. Cintas also discussed its recently announced agreement to acquire UniFirst, expecting the transaction to close in the second half of calendar 2026 and emphasizing the long-term value creation and operational efficiencies derived from the merger.

feed.title: Paychex, Inc. (NASDAQ:PAYX) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Paychex, Inc. reported strong Q3 2026 earnings, exceeding expectations with reported EPS of $1.71 against an expected $1.67. The company saw a 20% increase in total revenue and a 22% rise in adjusted operating income, driven by effective execution, the integration of Paycor, and advancements in AI initiatives. Paychex remains confident in its ability to deliver sustained shareholder value, emphasizing its robust free cash flow generation, commitment to returning capital, and continuous innovation in HCM through AI integration.

feed.title: Ecolab's $4.75B data center deal delivers $240K average payout to 640 employees
feed.summary: Ecolab is acquiring CoolIT, a data center cooling systems maker, for $4.75 billion. This deal will result in an average payout of about $240,000 to CoolIT's 640 employees, while CoolIT's private equity owner will receive 15 times its initial investment. The acquisition significantly benefits both the employees and the private equity firm involved.

feed.title: Prudential (LON:PRU) Price Target Lowered to GBX 1,450 at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for Prudential (LON:PRU) from GBX 1,500 to GBX 1,450, while maintaining an "overweight" rating, suggesting a significant upside. Despite this adjustment, other analysts like Citigroup and Deutsche Bank have recently raised their targets, and the consensus among five equities research analysts remains a "Buy" with an average target price of GBX 1,373. Prudential's stock opened at GBX 1,068, trading below analyst targets, and has a market cap of £26.9 billion with a P/E ratio of 8.3.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land Corporation $TPL Shares Bought by World Equity Group Inc.
feed.summary: World Equity Group Inc. significantly increased its stake in Texas Pacific Land Corporation (NYSE:TPL) by 220.3% in the fourth quarter, now owning 8,481 shares valued at $2.436 million. This news comes as other institutions also made substantial purchases, and Texas Pacific Land reported stronger-than-expected quarterly earnings, raising its dividend. The company's stock price has seen considerable movement, with KeyCorp raising its price target to $639 and maintaining an "overweight" rating.

feed.title: World Investment Advisors Buys 15,280 Shares of Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: World Investment Advisors increased its stake in Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOG) by 8.7% in the fourth quarter, purchasing 15,280 additional shares to bring its total holding to 190,654 shares, valued at nearly $60 million. The information services provider comprises 1% of the firm's portfolio and is its 16th largest position. Analysts maintain a "Buy" rating on Alphabet with an average price target of $345.71, citing strong AI momentum despite facing legal and regulatory challenges.

feed.title: Coca-Cola CEO James Quincey: It was time for someone else to lead the next wave of growth
feed.summary: Coca-Cola Chairman and CEO James Quincey discussed his decision to step down as CEO, explaining that it was time for someone else to lead the company's next phase of growth. He also shared his thoughts on his successor, Henrique Braun, reflected on his legacy, offered insights on driving innovation, and hinted at his future plans during an interview with CNBC's Squawk Box.

feed.title: Bunge Global SA (NYSE:BG) Shows High Technical and Setup Ratings Ahead of Potential Breakout
feed.summary: Bunge Global SA (NYSE:BG) is highlighted as a potential breakout candidate due to its strong technical condition, evidenced by a perfect 10/10 ChartMill Technical Rating, and a high Setup Quality Rating of 8. The stock exhibits a solid uptrend, outperforming its market and group peers, and is in a period of consolidation, suggesting it's gathering energy for its next upward move. Technical analysis indicates precise resistance and support levels, offering potential entry and stop-loss points for investors seeking breakout opportunities.

feed.title: Truist Cuts Price Target on Extra Space Storage to $140 From $145, Keeps Hold Rating
feed.summary: Truist has lowered its price target for Extra Space Storage (EXR) to $140 from $145, while maintaining a Hold rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for the self-storage REIT, with some like JPMorgan also adjusting targets and BNP Paribas upgrading the stock. Extra Space Storage recently reported its Q4 2025 earnings, with core FFO and revenue rising, and provided 2026 guidance.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Satish Dhanasekaran Sells Shares of Keysight Techn
feed.summary: Satish Dhanasekaran, President and CEO of Keysight Technologies Inc (KEYS), sold 1,667 shares of the company on March 24, 2026. This transaction follows a pattern of insider selling at Keysight, with 26 insider sells against 1 insider buy over the past year. The stock is currently trading at $300, significantly above its GF Value of $179.16, indicating it is overvalued.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Neil Dougherty Sells 2,000 Shares of Keysight Tech
feed.summary: Neil Dougherty, Executive Vice President and CFO of Keysight Technologies Inc., sold 2,000 shares of the company on March 24, 2026, reducing his total holdings to 125,272.291 shares. The stock is currently trading at $298.37, indicating it is significantly overvalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.67 and a P/E ratio of 52.81, which is higher than both the industry median and the company's historical median. This transaction is part of a trend of 26 insider sells against one buy at Keysight Technologies Inc over the past year.

feed.title: T-Mobile Fell 11% in the Last 6 Months. Here’s How Much the Stock Could Rise in 2026
feed.summary: T-Mobile US (TMUS) stock has experienced an 11% decline over the past six months, trading near $211 per share, despite strong operational performance and growth in service revenue and fixed wireless broadband. Concerns about pricing changes and potential customer churn have led to lower valuation expectations among investors. However, a valuation model suggests the stock is currently undervalued, with a target price of $341, implying a 62% upside over approximately three years due to sustained subscriber growth, margin expansion, and efficiency gains from the Sprint merger and AI initiatives.

feed.title: The Home Depot to Present at the J.P. Morgan Retail Round Up Forum
feed.summary: The Home Depot announced that its executive vice president and CFO, Richard McPhail, will present at the J.P. Morgan Retail Round Up Forum on Thursday, April 9, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET. The presentation will be webcast live and archived on the company's investor relations website. The Home Depot operates 2,359 retail stores and over 1,250 SRS locations globally and employs over 470,000 associates.

feed.title: Plus Therapeutics appoints Ron Andrews to board of directors By Investing.com
feed.summary: Plus Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:PSTV) has appointed Ron Andrews to its Board of Directors, bringing over 35 years of experience in the diagnostics industry. Andrews has a strong background in capital raising and exits, having served in leadership roles at Abbott Diagnostics, Roche Molecular Diagnostics, and LifeTechnologies/Thermo Fisher. This appointment comes as the company faces financial challenges, with its stock having declined significantly over the past year, though InvestingPro analysis suggests it is slightly undervalued.

feed.title: The Home Depot to Present at the J.P. Morgan Retail Round Up Forum
feed.summary: The Home Depot announced that its executive vice president and CFO, Richard McPhail, will present at the J.P. Morgan Retail Round Up Forum on Thursday, April 9, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET. The presentation will be webcast live and archived on the company's investor relations website. The company also provided details about its size and stock exchange listing.

feed.title: CTERA Named a 2025 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Strong Performer for Hybrid Cloud Storage
feed.summary: CTERA has been recognized as a Strong Performer in the 2025 Gartner Peer Insights “Voice of the Customer” for Hybrid Cloud Storage, a distinction based entirely on end-user feedback. The company's CEO, Oded Nagel, emphasized that this recognition validates their commitment to providing powerful, secure, intuitive, and reliable solutions in a complex industry. Gartner defines Hybrid Cloud Storage as platforms that allow seamless data management across on-premises, edge, and cloud environments.

feed.title: Roberts Wealth Advisors LLC Has $4.17 Million Stock Position in Qualcomm Incorporated $QCOM
feed.summary: Roberts Wealth Advisors LLC decreased its stake in Qualcomm by 22.3% to 24,349 shares, now valued at $4.17 million. Despite the reduction, Qualcomm reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates, and announced a $0.89 quarterly dividend along with a $20 billion share buyback program. Analyst ratings for QCOM are mixed, with a consensus "Hold" and an average price target of $168.00, while institutional investors own 74.35% of the stock.

feed.title: Roberts Wealth Advisors LLC Cuts Stock Holdings in American Tower Corporation $AMT
feed.summary: Roberts Wealth Advisors LLC significantly reduced its stake in American Tower Corporation (NYSE:AMT) by 40.4% in Q4, selling 11,428 shares, yet still holding 16,843 shares worth about $2.96 million. This reduction comes despite American Tower missing Q4 EPS estimates but exceeding revenue expectations, and raising its quarterly dividend. The company also saw varied insider transactions and analyst ratings, with an average "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: Wedmont Private Capital Acquires 4,848 Shares of Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL
feed.summary: Wedmont Private Capital increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) by 4.8% in the fourth quarter, acquiring 4,848 additional shares to bring its total holding to 106,063 shares valued at $34.15 million. This makes Alphabet the firm's 17th largest position, accounting for approximately 1.2% of its portfolio. Despite significant insider selling over the past 90 days, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average price target of $367.18, driven by the momentum of Gemini, cloud growth, and advertising resilience.

feed.title: Westview Management dba Westview Investment Advisors Invests $3.39 Million in JPMorgan Chase & Co. $JPM
feed.summary: Westview Management dba Westview Investment Advisors has initiated a new position in JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM), acquiring 10,520 shares valued at $3.39 million, making it their 24th largest holding. The investment comes amidst a mixed news environment for JPM, including potential regulatory relief and strong investment-banking deal flow, alongside legal and reputational risks associated with a "debanking" lawsuit. Wall Street analysts generally hold a "Moderate Buy" rating for JPM with a consensus target price of $340.00.

feed.title: PPL vs. Ameren: Which Electricity Utility Stock Has Better Prospects?
feed.summary: This article compares the prospects of electricity utility stocks PPL Corporation and Ameren Corporation, both of which operate prominent regulated electric utilities. While both companies are solid performers, Ameren shows a slight edge due to its stronger Return on Equity (ROE), positive 2027 earnings estimate uptick, larger capital expenditure program, and better share price performance. The analysis suggests Ameren is a more appealing investment despite its slightly higher valuation.

feed.title: FactSet Deploys AI Beta to More Than 85K Users, Announces AI-Enabled Document Search Functionality to Transform Financial Productivity
feed.summary: FactSet has expanded its AI capabilities by rolling out AI-enabled Document Search in beta to over 85,000 users, aiming to accelerate financial professionals' access to insights from unstructured data. This new functionality allows users to extract information from various financial documents with auditable, source-linked results. The global release is planned for phased rollout through late spring 2026, building on FactSet's prior AI advancements and reinforcing its leadership in integrating AI into financial workflows.

feed.title: Cummins Takes Forever Rising Tour Nationwide After Strong Customer Response
feed.summary: Cummins Inc. announced the nationwide expansion of its Forever Rising Tour, showcasing its latest heavy-duty engine platforms directly to customers. The tour, featuring vehicles powered by the 2027 X15, X15N, and X10 engines, will continue at the Mid-America Trucking Show and travel nationwide through May 2026. It aims to provide customers with hands-on experience and demonstrate the performance, drivability, and integrated technologies of Cummins's offerings.

feed.title: Patrick Industries' 50-foot LED wall lets customers model RVs full scale
feed.summary: Patrick Industries (NASDAQ: PATK) has unveiled "The Experience," a new digital design studio in Elkhart, Indiana, featuring a 50'x14' LED screen and a Digital Twin workflow. This studio allows RV, marine, powersports, and housing customers to visualize designs at full scale, make real-time material adjustments, and reduce the need for physical prototypes. The goal is to accelerate design cycles, lower costs, and improve decision-making in product development.

feed.title: Roberts Wealth Advisors LLC Sells 5,750 Shares of Electronic Arts Inc. $EA
feed.summary: Roberts Wealth Advisors LLC reduced its stake in Electronic Arts (NASDAQ:EA) by 27.2% in the fourth quarter, selling 5,750 shares and retaining 15,375 shares valued at $3.14 million. Despite institutional ownership being high at 90.23%, with new large stakes from Pentwater and increased positions from Ameriprise and State Street, insiders have sold 27,600 shares worth approximately $5.55 million in the last 90 days. Analysts generally rate EA as a "Hold" with an average price target of $188.30, while the stock currently trades around $202 and offers a quarterly dividend of $0.19.

feed.title: VA hospitals use Salesforce AI in Slack to free thousands of staff hours
feed.summary: Salesforce and the Veterans Health Administration (VHA) have deployed a new AI-powered agentic operating system within Slack to enhance incident response and improve Veteran care across 150+ facilities. This system streamlines operations, integrates tools, and provides real-time data insights, freeing up thousands of staff hours previously spent on administrative tasks. The VHA plans to expand this integration to VA Health Connect for telehealth collaborations, further leveraging AI to move from reactive reporting to proactive care.

feed.title: Kroger CIO Weighs In on the Future of AI at GroceryTech 2026
feed.summary: Kroger CIO Jim Clendenen will present at GroceryTech 2026 on how the company is using AI to create a more human-centric experience for both customers and associates. His session, "Supporting Teams, Serving Customers: AI’s Role in the Future of Grocery," will delve into Kroger's multi-layered tech strategy, including their Gemini-powered personal shopping assistant and real-time labor optimization. The event aims to provide retail leaders with actionable roadmaps for integrating high-tech efficiency with high-touch service in the grocery industry.

feed.title: New Uber ultra premium service comes to San Francisco: ‘First class, down to the last detail’
feed.summary: Uber has launched its new ultra-premium service, Uber Elite, in San Francisco, Los Angeles, and New York. This service offers luxury cars, professional chauffeurs, and optional airport meet-and-greet services, aiming to cater to businesses and individuals seeking a more luxurious transportation experience.
